narrative:
10Roseville (precinct in Perry County) has 445 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a clear Republican lean of 7.6 percentage points.
